title: Use of English – 2023 – Acceso Titular B

questions.prompt: I had the gas pipes... last week.
I’m looking forward to... promoted at work.
My car broke... and that’s why I was late.
Your sister is still mad... me.
The cows are being milked now.
answers: Someone is / They are milking the cows now

questions.prompt: Unfortunately, they don’t believe Jack is a great musician.
answers: Unfortunately, Jack isn’t believed to be a great musician
Unfortunately, it isn’t believed that Jack is a great musician

questions.prompt: The president is giving an interview at a local TV channel.
questions.instruction: Give a question for the underlined words.
answers: Where is the president giving an interview?

questions.prompt: Paris is known as the City of Light. I’d like to go there.
answers: Paris, where I’d like to go, is known as the City of Light
I’d like to go to Paris, which is known as the City of Light

questions.prompt: I’m sure Jim was in the garden when the phone rang.
answers: Jim must have been in the garden when the phone rang

questions.prompt: Nobody won a medal except Jane.
answers: The only person / one who / that won a medal was Jane

questions.prompt: I asked to them where had they parked the day before.
questions.instruction: Find the mistakes and rewrite correctly.
answers: I asked them where they had parked the day before

questions.prompt: ‘Shall we go to the cinema?’ Jane asked.
answers: Jane suggested going to the cinema
Jane suggested that we (could / should) go to the cinema
Jane suggested that we go to the cinema

questions.prompt: Use the words in the boxes to make a meaningful sentence. Use all and only the words in the boxes without changing their form.
questions.instruction: Words: . / is / only / to / deal / talking / with / the / way / problems
answers: Talking is the only way to deal with problems
